understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate the player from the starting position to the goal tile marked with a '+' sign, avoiding spikes that end the run. The game is played in levels, each with 2 attempts and 50 turns per attempt. Efficiency is encouraged.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement: The player can move left or right by one tile per turn. Gravity is always down; if there is no solid tile directly beneath the player, they will fall vertically until landing on a solid tile. Clicks: Specific clickable tiles (shown as clickable) can be removed by using the CLICK action with their coordinates. Removing a tile that the player is standing on or that supports the player will cause the player to fall. Removing other tiles does not move the player. Spikes are hazards that cause instant failure if landed on. The game likely has an undo or rewind mechanic for failed attempts, as failed attempts restart the level.
